name: me-decision-profile
description: Decision Profile tools for Claude Code: build a numeric model of a person's values and get advice aligned with who they actually are.

plugins.name: me-decision-profile
plugins.description: Build a person's numeric Decision Profile via a forced-tradeoff interview + stress scenarios, then give value-aligned, evidence-cited advice. Commands: /me-add <name> <language>, /me-ask <name>, and /me. Trilingual (en/de/es). Stores only computed integers + the name; never raw answers.
